title: IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Assistant Posts
description: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Various Senior Research Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply on or before the deadline of the applicat...
